concepts.title: Linear regression (OLS)
concepts.hook: Baseline supervised learning; understand bias-variance tradeoff.

concepts.title: Assumptions of linear regression (linearity, homoscedasticity, normality, independence)
concepts.hook: Violations affect inference; use diagnostics.

concepts.title: Regularization (Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net)
concepts.hook: Prevents overfitting; Lasso performs feature selection.

concepts.title: Logistic regression
concepts.hook: Binary classification; log-odds interpretation is key.

concepts.title: Polynomial and spline regression
concepts.hook: Capture nonlinearity; basis expansion approach.

concepts.title: Generalized Linear Models (GLM)
concepts.hook: Extends linear regression to non-normal outcomes.

concepts.title: Classification metrics (precision, recall, F1, AUC, specificity)
concepts.hook: Different metrics suit different business goals; understand tradeoffs.

concepts.title: Confusion matrix and threshold selection
concepts.hook: ROC curves show threshold tradeoffs; choose threshold based on cost.

concepts.title: Imbalanced classification
concepts.hook: Accuracy is misleading; use appropriate metrics and resampling.

concepts.title: Naive Bayes
concepts.hook: Assumes feature independence; surprisingly effective despite strong assumption.

concepts.title: Decision trees
concepts.hook: Interpretable; prone to overfitting without pruning.

concepts.title: Random forests
concepts.hook: Ensemble of trees; reduces variance via bagging.

concepts.title: Gradient Boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM)
concepts.hook: Sequential tree building; strong baseline for tabular data.

concepts.title: Support Vector Machines (SVM)
concepts.hook: Max-margin classifier; kernel trick enables nonlinear boundaries.

concepts.title: K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
concepts.hook: Simple baseline; sensitive to scaling and curse of dimensionality.

concepts.title: K-means and initialization
concepts.hook: Minimizes within-cluster variance; k-means++ improves initialization.

concepts.title: Hierarchical clustering
concepts.hook: Produces dendrograms; interpretable but computationally expensive.

concepts.title: DBSCAN
concepts.hook: Density-based; handles non-convex clusters and noise.

concepts.title: Gaussian Mixture Models (GMM)
concepts.hook: Probabilistic clustering; EM algorithm fits the model.

concepts.title: Dimensionality reduction for clustering
concepts.hook: Curse of dimensionality; reduce d before clustering.

concepts.title: Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
concepts.hook: Orthogonal linear combination of features; maximizes variance.

concepts.title: t-SNE and UMAP
concepts.hook: Nonlinear manifold learning; useful for visualization.

concepts.title: Feature selection vs feature extraction
concepts.hook: Selection preserves interpretability; extraction creates new features.

concepts.title: Variance explained and scree plots
concepts.hook: How many components to keep; elbow method is heuristic.

concepts.title: Train/validation/test splits
concepts.hook: Train learns parameters; validation tunes hyperparameters; test estimates generalization.

concepts.title: Cross-validation (k-fold, stratified)
concepts.hook: More stable estimates than single holdout; stratification for imbalanced data.

concepts.title: Learning curves
concepts.hook: Diagnose bias (high training error) vs variance (gap between train and test).

concepts.title: Hyperparameter tuning (grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization)
concepts.hook: Random search often beats grid; Bayesian methods are sample-efficient.

concepts.title: Overfitting, underfitting, and regularization
concepts.hook: Classic bias-variance tradeoff visualized in learning curves.
